name: Peasant-Style Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add garlic and tomatoes; sauté until tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in prosciutto, black pepper, and oregano.
4. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 2 to 3 minutes until all ingredients are well blended.
5. Drain spaghetti and add it to the skillet with the sauce.
6. Toss everything together and garnish with chopped parsley.
7. Serve hot, topped with grated Parmesan cheese.
